summary: Finished matching sysdolphin/baselib/tev.c enough to delete the 1311-line asm/sysdolphin/baselib/tev.s fallback and switch tev.c from NonMatching to Matching in the build. The substantive C work implemented HSD_SetupChannel with GX channel color/control caching behavior, added small color comparison/copy helpers, adjusted HSD_SetupTevStageAll loop structure, and tightened HSD_Chan field types in state.h to GX enum types.

key_files.role: Deleted matched assembly fallback for sysdolphin baselib TEV.
Implemented remaining matching C, especially HSD_SetupChannel, helpers, and HSD_SetupTevStageAll cleanup.
Changed HSD_Chan fields from generic integer types to GXChannelID, GXColorSrc, GXLightID, GXDiffuseFn, and GXAttnFn.
Changed sysdolphin/baselib/tev.c from NonMatching to Matching.
Swapped object list from asm/sysdolphin/baselib/tev.s.o to src/sysdolphin/baselib/tev.c.o.

what_changed: Removed asm/sysdolphin/baselib/tev.s, a 1311-line assembly fallback for tev.c.
Marked Object(Matching, "sysdolphin/baselib/tev.c") in configure.py instead of Object(NonMatching, ...).
Updated obj_files.mk so the build links src/sysdolphin/baselib/tev.c.o instead of asm/sysdolphin/baselib/tev.s.o.

Implemented HSD_SetupChannel in C, replacing NOT_IMPLEMENTED with logic for null/GX_COLOR_NULL early return, channel index calculation, ambient/material color updates, GXSetChanAmbColor, GXSetChanMatColor, GXSetChanCtrl, and prev_ch cache updates.
Added static helpers CompareRGB, CompareRGBA, CopyRGB, setAmbColor, and setMatColor in tev.c.
Changed HSD_SetupTevStageAll from a while loop mutating desc and using var_r31/temp_r3 names to a for loop over a separate HSD_TevDesc* td and int num/tmp variables.
Retyped HSD_Chan fields in state.h: chan became GXChannelID, amb_src/mat_src became GXColorSrc, light_mask became GXLightID, diff_fn became GXDiffuseFn, and attn_fn became GXAttnFn.
smart_moves: Factored color word comparisons into CompareRGB and CompareRGBA, mirroring the assembly behavior that compared full RGBA or masked off alpha with 0xFFFFFF00.
Used CopyRGB to preserve the destination alpha byte while copying only RGB bits, matching the assembly pattern that kept low 8 bits and updated upper 24 bits.

Wrapped GXSetChanAmbColor and GXSetChanMatColor in setAmbColor/setMatColor helpers taking GXColor by value and then passing a local pointer, a likely stack-shape/control-flow matching tactic for these GX APIs.
Preserved state-cache semantics around prev_amb_invalid, prev_mat_invalid, prev_ch, and combined COLOR0A0/COLOR1A1 channel mirroring instead of blindly issuing GX calls.
Used explicit goto labels set_amb and set_mat to share the GX call path and match branch structure without duplicating calls.
Kept HSD_SetupTevStageAll logically identical while changing iteration shape and variable lifetimes to match: separate td cursor, max stage count in num, then GXSetNumTevStages and current_tev reset.
decomp_lessons: For GX color structs, exact matching may require treating GXColor as a u32 and masking bytes rather than comparing fields one by one.
When the original code caches hardware state, reproduce both the visible GX calls and the cache updates; omitting cache mirroring can alter later branch behavior and matching.
Typed headers can help matching and readability: replacing u32/s32 placeholders in structs with GX enum typedefs documents API intent without changing layout.
Small helper functions can be necessary to recover stack temporaries and call signatures when SDK functions expect pointers to by-value local data.
Loop cursor choice matters for matching: using a separate iterator variable instead of mutating the parameter can change register allocation enough to match.
When a file becomes fully matched, remember all build-system transitions: delete the asm fallback, update obj_files.mk, and change configure.py from NonMatching to Matching.
naming_conventions: New static helper names use concise behavior names: CompareRGB, CompareRGBA, CopyRGB.
Local labels in HSD_SetupChannel use action-oriented names set_amb and set_mat.
HSD_SetupTevStageAll replaced decomp scratch names var_r31 and temp_r3 with semantic locals num, td, and tmp.
Header fields use GX SDK type names where available: GXChannelID, GXColorSrc, GXLightID, GXDiffuseFn, GXAttnFn.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Deleted the asm fallback only after marking tev.c Matching and updating the object list to compile C instead of assembly.
Used u32 pointer casts on GXColor to generate word-level XOR/equality operations matching the assembly's packed color comparisons.
Used the mask 0xFFFFFF00 to compare/copy RGB while preserving alpha, corresponding to assembly bit operations such as clrrwi/rlwimi behavior shown in the deleted tev.s.
Used small non-inline-looking wrappers around GXSetChanAmbColor and GXSetChanMatColor to force a local GXColor pointer argument pattern.
Used gotos to converge multiple condition branches onto one GX setter call site.
Adjusted HSD_SetupTevStageAll loop form to a for loop with a separate cursor, which is a common register-allocation matching lever.
follow_up_queries: Find other PRs that use u32 casts on GXColor for RGB/RGBA comparison matching.
Find other sysdolphin baselib files switched from asm fallback to src C object in obj_files.mk.
Search for HSD_SetupChannel cache semantics around prev_ch, prev_amb_invalid, and prev_mat_invalid.
Look for other matching fixes where SDK enum typedefs in headers improved decomp output.
